rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>你看啊，<unk[5:0]>那巨大的鲸鱼化石，<unk[5:0]>
那尖细的嘴部，实在是太漂亮了。
它和奥尔汀的小鲸鲸
是不同的品种吗？
还是说，这是性别上的区别呢？<unk[5:0]>
真是太令人感兴趣了！
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>不过……<unk[5:1]>它<Color=red>有些骨头脱落了<Color=white>，
真是太遗憾了……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>你看，<unk[5:0]>這巨大的鯨魚化石，<unk[5:0]>
那尖銳的嘴巴超級可愛的。
它跟奧爾汀的鯨魚
是不是不同種類啊？
還是說這是雌雄上的差異呢？<unk[5:0]>
真是耐人尋味啊。
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>不過……<unk[5:1]><Color=red>它的骨頭脫落了<Color=white>，
這實在太可惜了……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ねえ<Ruby={2:2}み>見て<unk[5:0]> この<Ruby={2:4}おお>大きな クジラの<Ruby={4:6}かせき>化石<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:6}するど>鋭いお<Ruby={2:4}くち>口が とってもキュート
オルディンのクジラちゃんとは
<Ruby={4:8}しゅるい>種類が<Ruby={2:4}ちが>違うのかしら？
それとも オスとメスの<Ruby={2:4}ちが>違いなのかしら？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={6:12}きょうみぶか>興味深いわ
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>でも…<unk[5:1]> <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}ほね>骨が<Ruby={2:4}はず>外れちゃってる<Color=white>のが
<Ruby={4:8}ざんねん>残念なのよね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>Are you seeing what I'm seeing?!<unk[5:0]>
How adorable is the sharp, little mouth
on this leviathan skeleton?
He looks so different from the one in
Eldin too. Maybe he's another species?<PageBreak>Or should I say "she"? What if they're the
same species, but one's a boy and one's
a girl!<unk[5:0]> Oh, it's just so fascinating!
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>Which makes it even sadder...<unk[5:1]>that some of
this little dumpling's <Color=red>bones are missing<Color=white>.

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:0]><Color=red><Ruby={4:6}せぼね>背骨<Color=white>が<Ruby={2:4}ひと>一つ <Ruby={2:4}はず>外れてしまっているの
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]>One of the <Color=red>bones in this cutie's spine<Color=white>
is detached.

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:0]><Color=red><Ruby={2:4}ゆび>指の<Ruby={2:4}ほね>骨<Color=white>が<Ruby={2:4}ひと>一つ <Ruby={2:4}はず>外れてしまっているの

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>唉……<unk[5:0]>
亏我都赶到这儿来了……<unk[5:1]>
真想看一眼
<Color=red>全身骨架完整的鲸鱼<Color=white>啊。
<unk[3:0:3]><Color=red>脱落的骨头<Color=white>肯定就在某处……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>唉……<unk[5:0]>
我都特地來到這裡了……<unk[5:1]>
真希望至少能看到
<Color=red>鯨魚全身骨頭齊全的模樣<Color=white>啊。
<unk[3:0:3]>我想<Color=red>脫落的骨頭<Color=white>應該就在某處……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]>はあぁ<unk[5:0]>
せっかく ここまで<Ruby={2:2}き>来たのに…<unk[5:1]>
どうせなら<Color=red> <Ruby={4:8}ぜんしん>全身の<Ruby={2:4}ほね>骨が<Ruby={2:4}そろ>揃ったクジラの<Ruby={2:6}すがた>姿<Color=white>を
<Ruby={2:2}み>見てみたかったなぁ
<unk[3:0:3]>どこかに <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}はず>外れた<Ruby={2:4}ほね>骨<Color=white>があるとは<Ruby={2:4}おも>思うんだけど…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>*sigh* <unk[5:1]>Every step I took on the long walk
here, I thought,<unk[5:1]> "I can't wait to see the
<Color=red>fully intact leviathan fossil<Color=white>."
<unk[3:0:3]>I bet the <Color=red>missing bones<Color=white> are still right
nearby too...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]>只要能看到完整的鲸鱼，
出多少钱我都愿意……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]>只要能讓我看到鯨魚完整的模樣，
要我花多少錢都不是問題。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]>ちゃんとしたクジラの<Ruby={2:6}すがた>姿が<Ruby={2:2}み>見れるなら
お<Ruby={2:4}かね>金は いくら<Ruby={2:4}はら>払っても<Ruby={2:4}かま>構わないんだけどなぁ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]>Oh, I wish I could see it all together! I'd
pay anything for one good look at it.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>啊，好吧。
本来还想跟你聊聊化石……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>哎呀，這樣啊。
我本來還想聊一些化石的話題……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]>あら そう<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:6}かせき>化石の<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話したかったのに…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>O-oh, OK. I was hoping we could talk
fossils again...
I wanna see the full thing...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>唉……<unk[5:0]>
亏我都赶到这儿来了……<unk[5:1]>
真想看一眼
骨架完整的鲸鱼啊。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>唉……<unk[5:0]>
我都特地來到這裡了……<unk[5:1]>
真希望至少能看到
鯨魚全身骨頭齊全的模樣啊。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]>はあぁ<unk[5:0]>
せっかく ここまで<Ruby={2:2}き>来たのに…<unk[5:1]>
どうせなら <Ruby={4:8}ぜんしん>全身の<Ruby={2:4}ほね>骨が<Ruby={2:4}そろ>揃った クジラの<Ruby={2:6}すがた>姿を
<Ruby={2:2}み>見てみたかったなぁ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>*sigh* <unk[5:1]>After all that walking, I was really
hoping to see the leviathan fully intact...

<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>You...<unk[5:0]>fixed it? <unk[5:1]>You fixed it! <unk[5:0]>Look at that—
it's good as new!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>Ahhh... Take a moment to drink it all in.
Those elegant fins, that rigid back...
It's simply breathtaking!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]>是你找到并复原化石的吧？
谢谢你让我大饱眼福。
来，<unk[5:0]>这是给你的谢礼，
收下吧。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]>是你幫我找到並復原的吧，
謝謝你。
給你，<unk[5:0]>這是你讓我大飽眼福的謝禮。
請收下吧。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]>アナタが<Ruby={2:2}み>見つけて <Ruby={4:8}ふくげん>復元してくれたのね<unk[5:0]>
ありがとう
これ<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:2}よ>良いもの<Ruby={2:2}み>見せてくれたお<Ruby={2:4}れい>礼よ
<Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取ってね<unk[5:1]>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]>I really can't thank you enough for fixing
my precious leviathan.

This is for you.<unk[5:0]> It's the least I can do
after getting to see such a darling fossil!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>虽然我想一直这么看下去……<unk[5:1]>
但是还有<Color=red>另外一头<Color=white>小鲸鲸呢。
<unk[3:0:1]>我要赶紧去见下个孩子！

接下来我打算
去见<Color=red>格鲁德地区的小鲸鲸<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:0]>把地图借我看一下。
rows.TWzh:

不過<Color=red>還有另外一頭<Color=white>鯨魚對吧？
<unk[3:0:1]>我也想趕快去看看它！

接下來我想去瞧瞧
<Color=red>格魯德地區的鯨魚<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:0]>你地圖借我看一下。

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>ここで ずっと<Ruby={2:2}み>見ていたいけど…<unk[5:1]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>I'd love to stay here gazing...<unk[5:1]>but there's
still <Color=red>one more<Color=white> leviathan out there!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:1]>They've been waiting for me for years,
and I don't wanna make them wait even
a second more!
The last <Color=red>leviathan is in the Gerudo region<Color=white>.
So that's my next stop!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:0]>Actually, let me see your <Color=red>map<Color=white>.

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:7]>このあたりに いるらしいの

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>How adorable do you think they'll be?
My money's on SUPER adorable!

<unk[3:0:1]>What am I doing waiting around here?<unk[5:1]>
